title: Unbounded recursion via nested allof/anyof test lists
description: TRIGGER: read_test_stmt calls read_test_list when it sees LParen; read_test_list calls read_test_stmt for each element. allof(allof(allof(...))) N levels deep causes N stack frames of mutual recursion with no guard. This is a separate recursion path from the block nesting bug. BAD BEHAVIOR: stack overflow panic instead of ParseError. Fix: share the same depth counter fix with the block recursion guard.
